title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LARAPAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAUSWAGAN, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3227 / 58 OG No. 23, 4273 (June 4, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 3366, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LARAPAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAUSWAGAN, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Larapan in the Municipality of Kauswagan, Province of Lanao del Norte, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Larapan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
